q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is os.system executing a shell command built from user input, which is shell execution / RCE.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: Not evaluated; decision made at Q1.

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: Not evaluated; decision made at Q1.

mock_guidance.target: Mock or patch os.system on line 73 within the make_backup function.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the exact command string argument passed to os.system, specifically the interpolated value of "cp %s %s" % (full_file_name, bak_file_path). Record this string for assertion to detect injection characters (e.g., ;, &, |, $(), backticks).
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Return 0 (success exit code) to allow the function to continue executing normally without performing any real shell operation.
notes: Ensure the mock is scoped only to os.system and does not affect other os module functions.
The primary assertion should check whether the captured command string contains shell metacharacters that indicate successful injection.
